binding_rows.claim: Supplies the four-dimensional relevance scope used to sort gravity inputs without proving a four-dimensional collapse theorem.
Supplies extracted Einstein-Klein-Gordon assumptions without proving well-posedness, collapse, or censorship.
Binds the Kerr-de Sitter WCCC source to the gravity source layer without promoting cosmic censorship.
Binds the slow-FOPT PBH source to the gravity source layer without proving PBH formation or dark matter.
Binds the PBH thermal-evaporation source to the gravity source layer without proving evaporation, detection, or dark matter resolution.
Binds the integrated source-map matrix to the named Chronos gravity stack without proving any gravity closure theorem.

boundary: No soundness theorem for the Chronos gravity stack binding map is claimed.
No four-dimensional collapse theorem is claimed.
No unrestricted non-symmetric collapse theorem is claimed.
No unrestricted cosmic censorship theorem is claimed.
No hoop conjecture result is claimed.
No unrestricted primordial black hole formation theorem is claimed.
No unrestricted primordial black hole evaporation theorem is claimed.
No dark matter detection is claimed.
No dark matter resolution is claimed.
does_not_prove: unrestricted primordial black hole formation theorem
unrestricted primordial black hole evaporation theorem
